creator: szhebin@yahoo.com
text: I want to install FreeBSD, I download the image from your website, and I check it md5sum(that is right), but I cannot boot it from BIOS(I can boot it on the virtual machine), I use command xxd to see it, I can see the bootsector is zero, then I use grub to boot it, but it displays a wrong about ACPI(I want to disable it, but I do not know how to disable), so, how do I do?, how to boot FreeBSD installation disc from grub?
